metadata.name: Apply for a New Business License

description: An entrepreneur is starting a new cafe and needs to apply for a city business license.

nodes.task_description: Gather information about the business, including name, address, type, and owner details.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all required business information.

nodes.task_description: Identify any other required permits, such as a health permit for a cafe.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent informs the applicant they will also need to apply for a health permit.

nodes.task_description: Process the business license application fee and issue a temporary license.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent takes payment and provides a temporary license pending final approval.
